dataset: Yahoo Finance S&P 500 ETF (SPY) Daily Data

pi_items.source: task description, SPY.Last.txt data file, verifier.py checks
task description, export_result.ps1 path check, verifier.py logic

privileged_info_summary: The task requires backtesting the built-in NinjaTrader SampleMACrossOver strategy on SPY daily bars. The provided SPY.Last.txt file contains exactly 502 days of authentic real-world OHLCV market data starting on 2023-01-03 and ending on 2024-12-31, exactly matching historical Yahoo Finance records. The agent is explicitly required to export the strategy's trades to 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\NinjaTraderTasks\spy_backtest_trades.csv', which is programmatically checked by the verifier.
